history.short-term: Lucas (Paris SG) sends a cross into the box, but David Ospina comes off his line to gather the ball. The defense poor positioning gave him room to deliver the cross, but keeper reacted quickly to claim possession.
history.long-term: They have been utilizing set pieces and crosses to create scoring opportunities, but the opposing goalkeeper has been responding effectively.

annotations.query: Thomas Meunier (Paris SG) sends a pass into the box, but his attempt is thwarted and cleared. The ball is out of play and Paris SG manage to earn a corner.
annotations.short-term: Thomas Meunier (Paris SG) sends a pass into the box, but his attempt is thwarted and cleared. The ball is out of play and Paris SG manage to earn a corner. Meunier had been actively pressing forward and delivered a strong cross into the box, but Koscielny’s well-timed tackle ensured Arsenal remained defensively solid.
annotations.query_ano: [PLAYER] ([TEAM]) sends a pass into the box, but his attempt is thwarted and cleared. The ball is out of play and [TEAM] manage to earn a corner.
